title: Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Roller Frame on a Pole 1.3m - 2.2m
features: The Harris walls and ceilings roller is ideal for general painting in hard to reach areas
For use with emulsion paints on large interior flat walls and ceilings.
For best results, rinse roller sleeve before use to remove any loose fibres
description: Introducing the Harris 101092006 Walls and Ceilings Roller, your go-to solution for achieving flawless paint finishes on large interior flat walls and ceilings. Designed for use with emulsion paints, this roller is perfect for tackling those hard-to-reach areas with ease. To ensure optimal performance, we recommend rinsing the roller sleeve before the first use to remove any loose fibers. After painting with water-based paints like emulsion, simply remove excess paint with a multi-tool and wash the roller sleeve in warm, soapy water. Use the multi-tool to thoroughly scrape off any remaining paint from the roller surface. Once cleaned, allow the roller to dry standing up for best results. Transform your painting experience with the Harris 101092006 Walls and Ceilings Roller, delivering professional-quality results every time. Add it to your toolkit today and achieve smooth, even coverage effortlessly.
